assessmentItems.name: Assessment 1: Weekly Quizzes (Individual)
assessmentItems.format: Online Weekly Quizzes, submitted on Sundays, 11:59pm

learningObjectives: Develop a toolkit of essential financial market tools applicable to various real-world scenarios.
Implement modern techniques to collect, manipulate and analyse financial data.
Design tools to test predictions derived from financial theory using real world data.
Collaborate in technical financial team projects, communicating processes and findings to diverse audiences.
